creator: m.oosterhof@xs4all.nl
text:
For KerberosIV (Bones) the configuration files are installed by default in /etc/KerberosIV
(krb.realms and krb.conf)

For Kerberos5 (Heimdal) this is not done. To be consistent it should also be installed.
Also: the manual page for krb5.conf(5) is not installed by default.

Fix: 

Create /usr/src/etc/krb5.conf (an example is located in /usr/src/crypto/heimdal/lib/krb5.conf)
How-To-Repeat: n/a
